workExperiences.title: Software Developer - Fuel Cell Store
workExperiences.description1: Sole developer for an end-to-end ERP/MES-style platform — independently architected a 50+ table relational database schema and 100,000+ line codebase supporting order processing, lot-level material traceability, and fuel cell manufacturing workflows.
workExperiences.description2: Led migration of a live e-commerce platform (OpenCart 1.5 → 3.0) with 2,000+ products and 70,000+ historical orders, including custom SQL migration scripts, full UI redesign, and zero data loss. Designed and optimized complex SQL queries and database schemas to support reporting and system performance.
workExperiences.description3: Developed and maintained REST APIs to integrate internal tools; maintained and stabilized production systems by diagnosing issues and improving reliability. Leveraged Claude Code and AI-assisted workflows to accelerate feature delivery and reduce development cycle time.

workExperiences.title: Software Engineering Intern - DigiFinex
workExperiences.description1: Collaborated with product managers and senior engineers to design, analyze, and implement system features in line with business requirements.
workExperiences.description2: Participated in developing interface protocols, documentation, and API integrations for the trading platform.
workExperiences.description3: Developed and tested frontend and backend components to ensure system reliability and performance.

workExperiences.title: 软件开发工程师 - 燃料电池商店
workExperiences.description1: 作为唯一开发者，独立架构并开发端到端ERP/MES平台，包含50+张关系型数据库表、10万+行代码，支持订单处理、批次级物料可追溯性及燃料电池制造全流程管理。
workExperiences.description2: 主导线上电商平台迁移项目OpenCart 1.5 → 3.0，迁移2,000+商品及70,000+历史订单，编写自定义SQL迁移脚本，完成完整UI重设计，实现零数据丢失。设计并优化复杂SQL查询与关系型数据库schema，支持报表生成与系统性能提升。
workExperiences.description3: 开发并维护REST API，整合内部工具，支持前后端跨系统通信；负责生产系统的持续维护与稳定运行，诊断并修复线上问题。深度运用Claude Code及AI辅助开发工作流，加速功能交付，显著缩短开发周期。

workExperiences.title: 软件开发实习生 - DigiFinex
workExperiences.description1: 与产品经理和高级工程师协作，根据业务需求设计、分析和实现系统功能。
workExperiences.description2: 参与开发交易平台所需的接口协议、文档和API集成。
workExperiences.description3: 开发并测试前端和后端组件，确保系统可靠性与性能达标。
